raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5 cm diameter) is directly reachable from the front; there is enough clearance around it for the right claw to close without colliding with either box.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right claw and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "front-right corner of the table",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the front-right corner of the table is free of objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released at the front-right corner, clearing the workspace in front of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "lighter box",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right side of the lighter box is accessible and there is at least 10 cm of free space to its right so it can slide without falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The lighter box is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between the two boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "darker box",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A sufficient gap now exists on both the left and right sides of the darker box, allowing both arms to approach simultaneously without interference; no object blocks vertical lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "Both arms securely clasp the darker box from its left and right sides, lifting it slightly off the table— the robot is now holding the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5 cm diameter) is directly reachable from the front; there is enough clearance around it for the right claw to close without colliding with either box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right claw and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the front-right corner of the table is free of objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released at the front-right corner, clearing the workspace in front of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right side of the lighter box is accessible and there is at least 10 cm of free space to its right so it can slide without falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The lighter box is translated ~10 cm to the right, creating a clear lateral gap between the two boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: A sufficient gap now exists on both the left and right sides of the darker box, allowing both arms to approach simultaneously without interference; no object blocks vertical lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both arms securely clasp the darker box from its left and right sides, lifting it slightly off the table— the robot is now holding the darker box.
